name: Multi-Phase Refactor Pipeline
description: Five-node pipeline with parallel analysis phases that fan-in to a synthesis phase, followed by implementation, testing, and documentation. Demonstrates parallel execution with fan-in merge.

nodes.description: Analyze the codebase for structure, dependencies, code quality, coupling, and hotspots. Produce a structural analysis report.
nodes.prompt_template: Analyze the codebase structure for the refactoring task: {{input.task}}. Identify: module boundaries, dependency graph, tight coupling, code hotspots, test coverage gaps, and architectural violations.

nodes.description: Inventory existing tests: unit tests, integration tests, E2E tests. Identify test gaps and flaky tests. Run in parallel with code-analysis.
nodes.prompt_template: Inventory all existing tests for the codebase. Target: {{input.task}}. Catalog: test files, coverage per module, test types (unit/integration/e2e), flaky tests, and missing test areas.

nodes.description: Synthesize findings from code-analysis and test-inventory into a unified refactoring plan. Runs after both analysis phases complete (fan-in).
nodes.prompt_template: Synthesize findings into a unified refactoring plan. Code analysis: {{parent.code-analysis.output.data.module_map}}. Hotspots: {{parent.code-analysis.output.data.hotspots}}. Test gaps: {{parent.test-inventory.output.data.missing_tests}}. Create a phased refactoring plan with: targets, order, risk assessment, and testing strategy.

nodes.description: Execute the refactoring plan. Implement changes phase by phase, ensuring backward compatibility where required.
nodes.prompt_template: Execute the refactoring plan. Plan: {{parent.synthesis.output.data.refactoring_plan}}. Risk matrix: {{parent.synthesis.output.data.risk_matrix}}. Testing strategy: {{parent.synthesis.output.data.testing_strategy}}. Implement changes phase by phase, maintain backward compatibility, and update tests as needed.

nodes.description: Run full verification: lint, typecheck, test suite, and manual validation. Produce a completion report.
nodes.prompt_template: Run full verification on the refactored codebase. Changes: {{parent.implementation.output.data.changed_files}}. Refactoring log: {{parent.implementation.output.data.refactoring_log}}. Test updates: {{parent.implementation.output.data.test_updates}}. Run: lint, typecheck, all tests, integration tests. Report any regressions.
